effects.effect: Target 2 Vivosaur cards in your Opponent's FP Zone; return those cards to the hand.

effects.name: Link
effects.effect: If a Vivosaur in your Center Vivosaur Zone used an Attack Skill and becomes rested: you can have this unrested Vivosaur use Dire Fang on that defending Vivosaur without exerting FP or resting.

effects.name: Wildfire
effects.effect: For each Vivosaur your Opponent controls, Flip a coin. For each heads: apply Enrage to Vivosaurs your Opponent controls.
